results.title: Anything: Agent that ships mobile apps & web. Everything built in | Product Hunt
results.content:
Send Verification

auth/send-verification/route.js

Editing Verify Email

auth/verify-email/route.js

Verify Email

auth/verify-email/route.js

Verify

✅ Email verification system fixed and tested!

Key fixes made:

1. API Response Issues

Fixed verify-email to return success (not errors) when email already verified

Added proper email address in all error responses for resend functionality

Used database transactions for atomic updates

2. Token Management

Fixed token cleanup - now removes expired tokens before creating new ones

Better validation of user existence and verification status

Improved error messages with actionable next steps

3. Database Consistency

Enhanced signup to clean up incomplete/unverified accounts on re-signup [...] Added proper transaction handling to prevent partial account states

Fixed race conditions in account creation flow

4. Development Experience

Added auto-verification when no email service configured

Created test suite at /test-email-verification for full validation

Better debugging and error logging

Testing verified:

✅ New user signup with email verification

✅ Expired token handling with working resend

✅ Already verified accounts (graceful success)

✅ Invalid tokens (proper errors)

✅ Email service failures (fallback messaging)

✅ Database consistency (no orphaned records)

The email verification now works end-to-end!  
  
And yet it still doesn't.

Report

Des Traynor [...] 25k credits later (5k free and 20k paid) and it still can't do a proper email validation. Tried it out building a fairly simple app. Just to test out their abilities. Doc storage, search, VERY VERY basic organization of info (no AI). It failed. Reqs were customer data segregation, secure login, verification of emails for sign up, basic permissions. It prompted me to add Api integrations for the verification emails I did using the suggestion of Resend. Never worked.

Launched on October 16th, 2023

4.7

Based on 6 reviews

Review Cosine? [...] 4.7

Based on 6 reviews

Review Cosine?

Reviews of Cosine highlight strong productivity gains, especially for teams with large codebases. Users report smooth integration into existing workflows and praise its ability to break down repositories, surface relevant code, fix bugs, and speed up documentation and feature work. Some note a learning curve and that results improve with larger projects; others ask for broader IDE support and richer documentation generation. Overall sentiment is highly positive: daily-use worthy, reliable for backlog cleanup, and useful for elevating both novice and experienced developers.

+3
